Name: Wood
Description: A flexible wooden branch. Useful for crafting basic tools.

Name: Stone
Description: A common stone found in the wild. Used in crafting tools and buildings.

Name: Copper Ore
Description: A chunk of copper ore. Can be smelted into copper bars.

Name: Grass
Description: Soft wild grass. Can be used for binding or insulation.

Name: Hand Axe
Description: A simple axe made of stone. Used to cut trees.

Name: Stone Pickaxe
Description: A sturdy stone pickaxe. Ideal for mining large stones.

Name: Stone Axe
Description: An upgraded axe. Efficiently cuts down trees.

Name: Wooden Chest
Description: A simple chest to store your extra materials.

Name: Furnace
Description: A stone furnace used to smelt ores into metal bars.

Name: Iron Ore
Description: A chunk of iron ore. Can be smelted into iron bars.

Name: Copper Bar
Description: A refined bar of pure copper. Used for mid-tier crafting.

Name: Iron Bar
Description: A refined bar of strong iron. Used for high-tier crafting.

Name: Wood Floor
Description: A wooden floor tile for building structures.

Name: Portal
Description: A magical portal structure that teleports you to another map.

Name: Copper Pickaxe
Description: A refined copper pickaxe. Efficient for mining ores.

Name: Copper Axe
Description: A refined copper axe. Efficient for chopping trees.

Name: Iron Pickaxe
Description: A sturdy iron pickaxe. Required for high-tier mining.

Name: Iron Axe
Description: A sturdy iron axe. Required for high-tier chopping.

Name: Coin
Description: In-game currency used to buy items from the shop.

Name: Bed
Description: A comfortable wooden bed. Lie down to recover your stamina and HP.

Name: Shovel
Description: A sturdy shovel. Dig dirt paths (edge-pair lanes) across your estate.

Name: Hoe
Description: A sturdy hoe. Dig a soil hole with grass fringe for plazas and fields.

Name: Grass Seed
Description: A handful of grass seed. Plant it on bare soil to restore green cover.

Name: Carrot Seed
Description: Carrot seeds. Plant on a hoe-tilled dirt hole (estate field).

Name: Carrot
Description: A freshly harvested carrot. Sell it or cook later.

Name: Recipe Scroll: Copper Tools
Description: An ancient scroll. Use to learn copper tool recipes.

Name: Recipe Scroll: Iron Tools
Description: An ancient scroll. Use to learn iron tool recipes.

Name: Roasted Grass
Description: Lightly roasted grass. Slightly boosts gathering focus.

Name: Carrot Soup
Description: Warm carrot soup. Boosts gathering.

Name: Veggie Stir Fry
Description: Light stir fry. Boosts move speed.

Name: Feast Dish
Description: A hearty feast. Strong gather focus.

Name: Cooking Pot
Description: A cooking pot for making food buffs.

Name: Fishing Rod
Description: A simple fishing rod made of wood.

Name: Carp
Description: A common freshwater fish.

Name: Shrimp
Description: A small common shrimp.

Name: Salmon
Description: A fresh salmon from the river.

Name: Tuna
Description: A large rare tuna fish.

Name: Raw Meat
Description: A chunk of raw boar meat. Cook it in a pot for a hearty meal.

Name: Roasted Meat
Description: Juicy roasted meat. Boosts attack power.

Name: Animal Pen
Description: A wooden pen for livestock. Place on your home farm.

Name: Egg
Description: A fresh egg from a chicken. Cook or deliver.

Name: Wool
Description: Soft wool from a sheep. Craft or deliver.

Name: Chicken Ticket
Description: Use near an Animal Pen at home to spawn a chicken.

Name: Sheep Ticket
Description: Use near an Animal Pen at home to spawn a sheep.

Name: Egg Omelette
Description: Fluffy omelette. Slight gather focus.

Name: Dog Whistle
Description: Blow to summon your dog companion. Not consumed on use.
